plugins.name: modus
plugins.description: Connect Claude to your organization's Modus context layer: discover published scopes (org experts), chat with them, run workflows, and ground answers in curated org context. Read and chat surface only — for admin actions (create/update/deploy/delete scopes, workflows, context items) install the separate modus-admin plugin from the same marketplace.

plugins.name: modus-admin
plugins.description: Administrative surface for Modus: create, update, deploy, and delete scopes, workflows, and context items. Requires admin permissions in Modus. Install alongside the `modus` plugin from the same marketplace; most users do not need it.
